word: H3680 - כָּסָה - kâçâh - kaw-saw' - Clad self

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּסה

Transliteration: kâsâh

Phonetic: kaw-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cover, conceal, hide
    1. (Qal) conceal, covered (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be covered
    3. (Piel)
      1. to cover, clothe
      2. to cover, conceal
      3. to cover (for protection)
      4. to cover over, spread over
      5. to cover, overwhelm
    4. (Pual)
      1. to be covered
      2. to be clothed
    5. (Hithpael) to cover oneself, clothe oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1008

Part(s) of speech: Verb
